product.familyDescriptorEn: Upholstery knits for seats and footwear

product.titleDescriptor: Warp Knit Pique Fabric for Shoes
descriptions: ArSeat Eco is 100% polyester, 120 g/m² warp knitted pique fabric.
It is suitable for car upholstery and sport shoes.
Warp Knit Pique Fabric for Shoes
technicalParameters: Dimensinal Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | TS EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: It is suitable for car upholstery and sport shoes.
acceptedMatches.rationale: Product description and technical parameters explicitly state car upholstery use.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Description mentions sport shoes, but this is footwear material rather than athletic apparel, and no explicit sportswear use is stated.
